LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. IHE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE FROM THE COMPLAINT OR JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE FACTS THAT THE CLAIM DID NOT SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLY. THIS RULING IS NOT A DETERMINATION THAT PLAINTIFF WILL BE PERMITTED TO PROCEED UNDER A FICTITIOUS NAME. DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, COURT REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR # 8068

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND AND DENIED THE MOTION TO STRIKE IN PART. THE COURT STRIKES $2992.95 (THE EXPERT WITNESS FEES AND DELIVERY CHARGES) FROM ITEM 13. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE EXPLAINING HOW THOSE COSTS WERE REASONABLY NECESSARY TO THE LITIGATION AND THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION UNDER CCP 998(C)(1) TO DENY THE CLAIMED EXPERT FEES. THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION TO TAX AS TO THE REMAINING COSTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MARK D. LIPTON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S Motion To Tax Costs is granted in part and and denied the motion to strike in part. The Court strikes $2992.95 (the expert witness fees and delivery charges) from item 13. Plaintiff does not present any evidence explaining how those costs were reasonably necessary to the litigation and the Court exercises its discretion under CCP 998(c)(1) to deny the claimed expert fees. The Court denies the motion to tax as to the remaining costs. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
